name: signal-audit-frontend-fixture
fixture_policy: committed signal_cards are local preview fixtures; default deploy fixtures exclude synthetic cards; production cards are generated on the server from FMZ signal_review.jsonl and optional LLM sidecar
frontend_contract: compact EDB ledger, transition audit, MACRO direction-background/shock-gate display, source_ref anchors, raw trace grouped navigation, and full frontend style/data audit before deploy changes
